title: Phase 17 – Ignore Volatile Automation Artifacts
summary: Reduce repo noise by ignoring ephemeral .automation outputs while keeping curated evidence files tracked.

integration_points.reason: These paths are generated per test run and code generation; they are not stable artifacts and need not be versioned.

positive: Lower risk of committing large, noisy artifacts
neutral: Does not ignore curated discovery/evidence notes under .automation/phase* files

compliance.protected_files: Not touching protected files per CODEOWNERS
